candidates.why: Best summary D&A line at the same operating-expense level as the selected XSGA component rows. It is separate from 'Research and Development expenses', 'Marketing and sales expenses', 'Administrative expenses', 'Other external costs', and 'Employee costs', so it should be added separately. It also matches the sum of the granular depreciation/amortization component rows shown below, so prefer this summary row to avoid double counting.
